description: Generic text section with an optional image. Supports three layout variants: text only, image left, image right.

title.description: Section heading. Omit to render the body without a heading.

body.description: HTML body content. Passed through wp_kses_post().

image_url.description: Image URL. Required for image-left and image-right layouts; ignored in text-only.

image_alt.description: Alt text for the image. Use empty string for decorative images.

layout.description: Column layout. Falls back to text-only if image_url is empty.

variant.description: Background presentation. 'default' = page background. 'dark' = dark surface. 'inverted' = inverted background for strong contrast. Controls per-section visual rhythm on marketing pages.
